description: Case style: Stainless steel round caseDial style: Concentric red, black and white coloured round dial, the dial has Fastrack logo and brand name on the dial, bold white markingsStrap style: Black genuine leather strap with a silver colour tang clasp for comfort and styleFeatures: Date aperture at the 3-hour mark, screw to reset time and dateWater resistance upto 50 mWarranty: 2 year warranty on mechanism only, 1 Year on battery
